title: Auto-set build tags for ostree and selinux
body:
Try to use pkg-config to check for 'ostree-1' and 'libselinux'.

If ostree-1 is not found, use the containers_image_ostree_stub build tag to not require it, at the cost of not being able to use or write images to the 'ostree' transport.

If libselinux is found, build with the 'selinux' tag,

comments.body: Question: should we doing something similar with apparmor and seccomp?
:hourglass: Testing commit a247474 with merge f28dcb3...

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/f28dcb3751391dc8e5e3a18c2b35b47cc6fb0984.1504013720714770688/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing f28dcb3751391dc8e5e3a18c2b35b47cc6fb0984 to master...
On further investigation, we probably want to expect libseccomp anywhere, and we're installing libapparmor in Travis for the sake of runc, so there's nothing to be done for them at this time.
